{{Quote|Great, Threepio! Get the camouflage cover over the ''freighter''!|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 31">[[Star Wars (1977) 31|''Star Wars'' (1977) 31]]</ref>}}
The '''freighter''' [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] took on his return to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] seeking [[blockade runner]]s for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] was a round ship capable of transporting a [[X-34 landspeeder/Legends|X-34 landspeeder]]. Unfortunately, despite putting a camouflage cover over the freighter, it ended up salvaged by Jawas.

==Behind the scenes==
Though this vessel is barely glimpsed in the story, it may resemble a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 31|''Star Wars'' (1977) 31]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 31}} {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars (1977) 32|''Star Wars'' (1977) 32]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 32}}

[[File:Rlukeship.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Luke's freighter being salvaged by Jawas.]]
